mapper.insert: insert into polyp_detect_task (task_no, patient_id, source_file_id, model_id, status, conf_threshold, result_id, inference_ms, error_msg, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskNo}, #{patientId}, #{sourceFileId}, #{modelId}, #{status}, #{confThreshold}, #{resultId}, #{inferenceMs}, #{errorMsg}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select task_id, task_no, patient_id, source_file_id, model_id, status, conf_threshold, result_id, inference_ms, error_msg, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from polyp_detect_task where task_id = #{taskId}
